name: Prepared Position
description: During the Deploy in Prepared Positions step of Setup, a unit with the Prepared Position keyword may Deploy by placing the unit leader of that unit completely within allied Territory. Then the remaining miniatures in that unit are placed in Cohesion with their unit leader and within allied Territory. /T_hat unit then gains 1 Dodge token. Miniatures cannot overlap impassable terrain when they are placed using Prepared Position.
official_rules_text: During the Deploy in Prepared Positions step of Setup, a unit with the Prepared Position keyword may Deploy by placing the unit leader of that unit completely within allied Territory. Then the remaining miniatures in that unit are placed in Cohesion with their unit leader and within allied Territory. /T_hat unit then gains 1 Dodge token.
